title: Notifications - Low Battery
scenario: Verify that pairing a device with battery below 5% triggers a low battery notification when the device is turned back on, and clicking the notification redirects to the Home screen.
steps: Pair a device with battery below 5% to the app
Put the app in the background
expected: 1) "Device has a low battery" notification appears. 2) User is redirected to the Poly Lens application Home screen.
